arts.ttl: Vitor Roque and Cardoso on Spurs' radar as Postecoglou plots January revolution
arts.sum: They were there to cast an eye over Brazilian striker Vitor Roque and USMNT international midfielder Johnny Cardoso. Vitor Roque is currently on loan at Real Betis from Barcelona .

arts.ttl: Arsenal fight Chelsea and Spurs for left-sided Ben White
arts.sum: Arsenal have enjoyed great success down the right with Ben White in that area of the park, and according to data analytics firm SciSports, there is a strong resemblance in style between the former Brighton star and De Cuyper. Arsenal, meanwhile, lead the chase for the player, yet Arteta will struggle to land him during January because De Cuyper wants to remain with Club Brugge until the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Tottenham team confirmed vs Nottingham Forest as Rodrigo Bentancur and Destiny Udogie return
arts.sum: Here's the Tottenham team that we reckon Postecoglou will select to face Nuno Espirito Santo's Forest side: Forster; Spence, Dragusin, Gray, Udogie; Sarr, Bentancur, Kulusevski; Johnson, Solanke, Son. Subs: Austin, Reguilon, Porro, Bissouma, Maddison, Bergvall, Olusesi, Werner, Lankshear. The Spurs boss has decided to give Djed Spence his fourth consecutive start, and a place again the side he spent a great loan season with, which means a rest for Pedro Porro, who has played more minutes than any Tottenham player this campaign.

arts.ttl: Tottenham, Newcastle and Aston Villa encouraged for signing – Club lower price after blocking PL trio’s summer approach
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur, Newcastle United and Aston Villa have been linked with Fiorentina’s Michael Kayode in the past. While Aston Villa had a low offer rejected in the summer transfer window, the other clubs were encouraged to move for the Italian, who has played only five times in the Serie A this season. arts.ttl: 'They let in three goals!' | Merse not 'carried away' by Liverpool win at Spurs
arts.sum: Paul Merson gives his thoughts on Liverpool's title credentials following their 6-3 win at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium.

arts.sum: Spurs face difficult meeting with former manager Nuno Espirito Santo

arts.ttl: Evan Ferguson signs, wonderkid deal, new keeper - Dream Tottenham squad after four January transfers - Lee Wilmot - football.london
arts.sum: But with injuries to goalkeeper Guglielmo Vicario, centre-backs Cristian Romero, Micky van de Ven and Ben Davies, forwards Odobert and Richarlison, as well as a lengthy seven-match FA ban for Rodrigo Bentancur, and things have not exactly gone to plan off the pitch. Spurs have signed a number of teenagers in the last few transfer windows - Archie Gray, Wilson Odobert, Lucas Bergvall and the soon-to-arrive Yang Min-hyeok among them.
